texto: When the tendencies (vruti) that were wandering around since time immemorial come within & enter into the Self’s (Soul’s) abode
autor: it is known as freedom from all wanderings (nivruti).
explicacao: Citação de it is known as freedom from all wanderings (nivruti). sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “When the tendencies (vruti) that were wandering around since time immemorial come within & enter …” articula reflexao, dada-bhagwan, tendencies em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
